## Public API / MCP Checklist

- [ ] If this PR changes REST API, `docs/openapi.yaml`, MCP tool names/schemas, auth modes, token scopes, or admin workflows, I updated `SKILLS.md`.
- [ ] If this PR changes an automation workflow, I updated or added examples under `scripts/examples/`.
- [ ] I ran `make examples-smoke` when touching `SKILLS.md` or `scripts/examples/`.
